title: Device Home Screen - Limited Support After Launch Date When LM Version Is Empty
scenario: Limited support pop-up "Device support coming soon" appears on device home screen when connected to an unsupported newly released device with empty LM version info
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on an Android device.
2. On the Home screen, connect a newly released Bluetooth audio device that is not yet supported by the app (i.e., LM version info is empty).
3. Observe the device home screen after the device's launch date.
4. Note the pop-up message that appears on the screen.
5. Tap outside the pop-up to dismiss it.
expected: A limited support pop-up appears on the device home screen with the message "Device support coming soon. In-app functionality may be limited." The pop-up can be dismissed by tapping outside of it.
